jokes.text: ♪ My little chicken ♪
jokes.setup: Romantic love song setup with conventional romantic expectations
jokes.punchline: Addressing a chicken as a romantic partner
jokes.explanation: Absurd juxtaposition of romantic song conventions with barnyard animal as subject

dialogue.line: ♪ My little chicken ♪

jokes.text: ♪ I love your breasts ♪
jokes.setup: Continuing the love song to chicken
jokes.punchline: Double meaning - chicken anatomy vs. sexual anatomy
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective double entendre, though somewhat predictable

dialogue.speaker: Adam Sandler
dialogue.line: ♪ I love your breasts ♪

jokes.text: ♪ I love the way You eat gravel / To help you digest ♪
jokes.setup: Romantic song about loving someone's habits
jokes.punchline: Specific chicken behavior as romantic trait
jokes.explanation: Clever mix of romantic cliché with actual chicken biology

dialogue.line: ♪ I love the way You eat gravel / To help you digest ♪

jokes.text: ♪ But I know / That the worst I should fear / Is a slight case Of salmonella ♪
jokes.setup: Romantic acceptance of partner's dangerous nature
jokes.punchline: Salmonella as the 'worst case scenario' of chicken romance
jokes.explanation: Brilliant payoff that takes the premise to its logical conclusion with medical specificity

dialogue.speaker: Adam Sandler
dialogue.line: ♪ But I know / That the worst I should fear / Is a slight case Of salmonella ♪

jokes.text: ♪ If an egg can fit in there, Why can't i? ♪
jokes.setup: Romantic ballad about physical compatibility
jokes.punchline: Graphic implication of sexual act with chicken via egg-laying logic
jokes.explanation: Crosses into shock humor territory - effective but relies on transgression

dialogue.line: ♪ If an egg can fit in there, Why can't i? ♪

jokes.text: ♪ My little / Chicken likes to wear Garter belts ♪♪
jokes.setup: Song about chicken's fashion preferences
jokes.punchline: Chicken wearing lingerie
jokes.explanation: Obvious escalation that feels somewhat forced compared to earlier verses

dialogue.line: ♪ My little / Chicken likes to wear Garter belts ♪♪

jokes.text: I have got to start Coming to rehearsal.
